failed_attempts:
induction L generalizing i with
  | nil => simp
  | cons l L ih =>
    simp only [flatten_cons]
    by_cases hi : i < l.length
    · -- i < l.length: findIdx = 1, j = 0, k = i
      have hfind : findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (map length (l :: L)).partialSums = 1 := by
        simp [partialSums_cons, findIdx_cons]
        rw [findIdx_eq] <;> grind
      simp only [hfind]
      simp [take_append_of_le_length (by omega : i ≤ l.length)]
    · -- i ≥ l.length: use IH with i - l.length
      have hi' : l.length ≤ i := by omega
      have hfind : findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (map length (l :: L)).partialSums =
          findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)) (map length L).partialSums + 1 := by
        simp [partialSums_cons, findIdx_cons, Function.comp_def]
        congr 1; funext x; simp only [decide_eq_decide]; omega
      simp only [hfind, Nat.add_sub_cancel]
      have := ih (i - l.length)
      simp only at this
      rw [take_append, this]
      have hfidx_pos : 0 < findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)) (map length L).partialSums := by
        simp only [partialSums]
        cases L with
        | nil => simp [findIdx_cons]
        | cons a L => simp [findIdx_cons]
      rw [take_cons hfidx_pos]
      simp only [flatten_cons]
      have : findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)) (map length L).partialSums =
          findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)) (map length L).partialSums - 1 + 1 := by
        omega
      rw [this, getElem?_cons_succ]
      rw [take_of_length_le (by omega : l.length ≤ i)]
      rw [← append_assoc]
      congr 1
      simp [length_flatten]
      omega
